    All Classes and Interfaces

    Classes
    Class
    Description
    Bus
    Represents a Bus in the transporation system.
    Date
     
    Driver
     
    EntryScreen
     
    Ministry
     
    PartyBus
    Represents a PartyBus, a specialized type of SportsBus used for entertainment and party transport.
    Plan
     
    Planner
     
    ReportScreen
     
    SportsBus
    Represents a SportsBus, a specialized type of Bus used for transporting competitors and staff for sporting events.
    SystemInfo
     
    Tester
     
    TrainingBus
    TrainingBus - A specialized Bus for training purposes Each bus has a name,size,price,comfort level,and a list of approved trips.
    Trip
     
    WorkArea
